data.content: Revised planning note now covers the missing initial take-loop non-zero-exit path, derives success from observed workflow state transitions instead of unavailable buildTakePrompt claim metadata, and places detailed per-agent outcome stats in a repo-local working-directory file under .foolery-logs. Implementation should centralize close-path handling, roll back active states on error, retry with a different agent when available, and stop only when the failed iteration has no alternate agent.
